protein_name: Seems to inhibit myoblast differentiation. Transcriptional repressor of E-box-dependent transactivation of downstream myogenic bHLHs genes. Binds preferentially to the canonical E-box sequences 5'-CAGGTG-3' and 5'-CACCTG-3'. Belongs to the snail C2H2-type zinc-finger protein family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
